room.caption: [CLFJ] They really like that drone.

instance.creationCode:
GID_SET(378907, self.id) type=0 sprite_index=sCHAOS_ShockUnitWalkB image_speed=0 image_xscale=-1
if global.gameProgress>=4430 {instance_destroy()}

bWall=1 myWallX=1408 myWallY=192 myWallScale=10
if global.newMapX>=512 {instance_destroy()}
